SUBJECT_INVALID.message: "{subject}" does not look like a valid subject. Please check what you entered.

TOPIC_NOT_IN_SUBJECT.message: "{topic}" does not appear to be part of "{subject}" for Grade {grade}. Please check the topic you entered.

TEACH_LOG_NOT_FOUND.message: No teaching log found for this topic and grade.

QA_GENERATION_FAILED.message: The lesson was logged, but question generation failed. Please try again.

QA_NONE_VERIFIED.message: No verified questions are available for this topic yet. Please try again.

GRADE_INVALID.message: The grade provided is not valid.

LLM_TIMEOUT.message: The AI service did not respond in time. Please try again.

LLM_GENERATION_FAILED.message: Question generation failed. Please try again.

LLM_INVALID_RESPONSE.message: The AI service returned an unexpected response.

DB_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION.message: The requested change conflicts with existing data.

AUTH_REQUIRED.message: You must be signed in to do this.

AUTH_FORBIDDEN.message: You do not have permission to do this.

ACCOUNT_INACTIVE.message: This account is no longer active.

SCHOOL_NOT_ASSOCIATED.message: No school is associated with this account.

LAST_SUPER_ADMIN.message: At least one super admin must remain for this school.

TEACHER_NOT_FOUND.message: This teacher could not be found.

STUDENT_NOT_FOUND.message: This student could not be found.

NO_PENDING_VERIFICATION.message: No pending verification found for this email.

VERIFICATION_CODE_EXPIRED.message: Your code has expired. Request a new one.

TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS.message: Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new code.

QUIZ_NOT_FOUND.message: This quiz could not be found.

QA_NOT_FOUND.message: This question could not be found.

DUPLICATE_ID.message: {id} already in use. Check all ids.

XLSX_FORMAT_INVALID.message: Incorrect xlsx format. Check column headings and values.

XLSX_VALUE_MISSING.message: Id, name and {field} must be entered.

EMAIL_ALREADY_USED.message: {email} is already used by another teacher.

EXTERNAL_SERVICE_FAILED.message: An external service failed to respond correctly.

BATCH_JOB_FAILED.message: A background job failed to complete.

FRONTEND_RUNTIME_ERROR.message: Something went wrong on the page. Please refresh and try again.

FRONTEND_NETWORK_ERROR.message: Could not reach the server. Please check your connection.
